text.title: EF Core Data Layer Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — use Dapper / raw ADO.NET on this path; EF compile cost dominates
skip-this-methodology — use Dapper for OLAP; change tracking is overhead
apply AsNoTracking + materialised projection; no IQueryable leakage from repo

branch.question: Does this path touch >100 rows in one transaction?
Is the entity an aggregate root?

conclusion.verdict: rely on SaveChangesInterceptor for audit fields; no per-entity duplication

text.example: shape=transactional_oltp → read_only=false → bulk_op=false → is_aggregate_root=true → concurrency-token-on-aggregates → require RowVersion + 409 on concurrency exception.
